docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,710.58 FILED BY MEHMET, YASMINE S AS TO DEFENDANT INTERIOR DEFINE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-10-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
